message.content:

6. The tsconfig and any relevant build config

Focus on: C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\docs but also check C:\Users\User for the project root. The project might be at C:\Users\User\citedby-ai.

Be very thorough - read Home.tsx completely, check the components directory, and understand the project conventions.
